title: SSA Periodic CDR Case Backlog, FY2014–FY2018
description: National year-end backlog of periodic Continuing Disability Reviews (CDRs) by program, fiscal years 2014–2018. One row per fiscal year; counts are dollars-free case counts. The data series was effectively zeroed out by FY2018 (the backlog-clearance initiative completed).

columns.name: OASDI-TITLE II
columns.description: Backlogged Title II (OASDI) periodic CDR cases.

columns.name: SSI-TITLE XVI ADULT
columns.description: Backlogged Title XVI (SSI) adult periodic CDR cases.

columns.name: SSI-TITLE XVI LOW BIRTH WEIGHT
columns.description: Backlogged Title XVI low-birth-weight infant CDR cases.

columns.name: SSI-TITLE XVI OTHER CHILDREN
columns.description: Backlogged Title XVI other-children CDR cases.

columns.name: TOTAL BACKLOG
columns.description: Sum of the four program columns for the fiscal year.

source.title: Periodic Continuing Disability Review Case Backlog

notes: Numeric cells are thousands-separated and quoted in the raw CSV (e.g. "199,240"). The FY2018 row uses '0*' where the asterisk is an SSA footnote indicating the backlog was cleared/not separately reported; parse '0*' as 0.
